name: After Holiday Ham Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Milk, apple juice, or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the flour and baking soda together.
2. Add the diced cooked ham to the flour mixture.
3. Cut in the butter until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Gradually add milk (or its alternatives) until the dough forms.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface.
6. Cut biscuit rounds, each about 2 inches in diameter.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
